mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_blocks ( user_id, todo_id, block_date, title, block_type, start_time, end_time, memo, origin_type, modified_after_creation, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{todoId}, #{blockDate}, #{title}, #{blockType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{memo}, #{originType}, #{modifiedAfterCreation}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_blocks SET todo_id = #{todoId}, block_date = #{blockDate}, title = #{title}, block_type = #{blockType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, memo = #{memo}, modified_after_creation = #{modifiedAfterCreation}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE schedule_block_id = #{scheduleBlockId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM schedule_blocks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 'PLANNED' AND block_date < #{baseDate} ORDER BY block_date ASC, start_time ASC, schedule_block_id ASC
